commit_summaries.message:
test/deps/import-busybox: use `with open()` pattern

Signed-off-by: Simon Deziel <simon.deziel@canonical.com>

doc/conf: remove unused import

And silence the false positive for `redirects`.

Signed-off-by: Simon Deziel <simon.deziel@canonical.com>

doc/conf: avoid unint variable

Signed-off-by: Simon Deziel <simon.deziel@canonical.com>

doc/conf: `sys.exit` is recommended over plain `exit`

Signed-off-by: Simon Deziel <simon.deziel@canonical.com>

doc/conf: simplify env lookup

Signed-off-by: Simon Deziel <simon.deziel@canonical.com>

doc/conf: drop unneeded parenthesys

Signed-off-by: Simon Deziel <simon.deziel@canonical.com>

doc/conf: avoid `os.system` which is prone to command injections

Signed-off-by: Simon Deziel <simon.deziel@canonical.com>

scripts/check-snap: fix `--format` handling

Signed-off-by: Simon Deziel <simon.deziel@canonical.com>
